// jarvis: Stub. Activepieces' upstream `tsconfig.base.json` lives in their repo root, which we don't vendor (we only need select packages). The vendored tsconfigs under packages/* all `extends` this file relative to here; without it, esbuild logs a warning every time a piece is built. This stub satisfies the resolution. Build settings come from the repo's root tsconfig.json + each piece's own compilerOptions, not from here.
